rationale: The cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core framing: it establishes safety as a strategic B2B customer-satisfaction attribute and links satisfaction to financial outcomes, while the citing paper argues safety training is a B2B customer-value lever affecting supplier selection. Both are in closely aligned B2B contexts and constructs (safety, customer evaluation/value), which suggests more than an incidental mention. With an exact DOI match, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
